```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.4em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.7em;text-align:center;">extend with one prompt</div>

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #C4881A;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1.15em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.15);text-align:left;">

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#FEF5E7;border:1px solid #F0DDB4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="message-square-quote" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">you →</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-size:0.58em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.7;font-family:'Georgia',serif;">
   Add <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#C4881A;">about.html</code> and <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#C4881A;">projects.html</code>. Match the style. Add a nav bar to all three pages with links to each other. Bold the current page in the nav.
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;background:#DCE9FA;padding:0.25em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;">Read styles.css</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.25em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;">Write 2 pages</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.25em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;">Edit 3 pages</span>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.55em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.08em;">
  one prompt · three files updated · consistent
 </div>

</div>
```
